title: Skill-Anything Main State
description: The top-level state.json that persists across Orchestrator sessions. Must stay compact (~<4KB) because it is always loaded into Orchestrator context (L1).

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this state schema. Bumped when schema breaks backward compatibility.

session_id.description: UUID of the current Orchestrator process. A new session_id on restart signals potential context compression or restart.

repo_url.description: URL or local path of the target repo being distilled.

phase.description: Coarse state-machine phase. Drives which next_action is legal.

context_mode.description: minimal = 200K budget, only L1 + OSR digests. rich = 1M budget, allowed to read L3 at whitelisted decision points.

current_iteration.description: Iteration counter, starts at 0 before first iter.

last_event_id.description: Pointer to the most recent entry in state/events.jsonl. Orchestrator reads that event on restart.

last_checkpoint_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last snapshot.

scores_history.description: Numeric history only. Full per-task scores live in state/iterations/iter-N.json.

age.description: Number of iterations this surprise has been open.

detail_path.description: Optional pointer to state/surprises/<id>.json if longer detail needed.

anomalies_count_by_type.description: Rolling counts of anomaly categories across iterations. Example: {tool_count_variance_low: 3, skill_won_rate_high: 2}.

meta_observations_digest.description: The N most recent short meta observations, trimmed to stay compact.

next_action_hint.description: Human/agent-readable hint about what the Orchestrator should do next on restart. Stored verbatim from the last event handler.
